metadata.methodology: Each sentence is scored by finding the hardest JLPT level required to understand it. Vocabulary is matched by surface-form substring (kanji ≥2 chars, kana ≥3 chars). Individual kanji are also checked. The sentence's level is the maximum JLPT level across all matched vocabulary and kanji. Sentences with no JLPT-classified content are marked null (unscored).

field_notes.estimated_level: Estimated JLPT level (N5=easiest, N1=hardest). Null if no JLPT vocabulary found.
